MGF¶

Given a map in the univariate form, return its multiplier group

Returns the linear Code with columns (1,x,f(x))

CF is in utils.rst.

1function MGF(f)
2    R:=Parent(f);
3    F:=BaseRing(R); n:=Degree(F);
4    a:=PrimitiveElement(F);
5    f1:=func<x | Evaluate(f,x) >;
6    MM:=AutomorphismGroup(CF(f1));
7    return MM;
8end function;
